exception.message:
element click intercepted: Element
...
is not clickable at point (882, 372). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.217) Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [6ddf629dec5f0cfe438285b55928ea62, clickElement {id=f.F8FC3539BED1BBA90E8E2743BC02591B.d.B3774096804A15115913D7AB9988DF05.e.121}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.217, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.178 (d096af1c9e9..., userDataDir: C:\Users\INNOVA~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:62043}, goog:processID: 13572, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62043/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.217, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (6ddf629dec5f0cfe438285b55928ea62)] -> xpath: //div[@class='custom-dropdown']/div[.=' Select Specialization ']] Session ID: 6ddf629dec5f0cfe438285b55928ea62
